summary: Frontend testing of /care DimExpanded panel full-width fix. Verified that the DimExpanded panel now opens as a sibling to care-dims-grid (not inside it), matching the DineSoulPage pattern. Panel is 960px wide = grid width, isFullWidth confirmed True with widthDiff=0.
critical_code_review_comments: CareSoulPage.jsx: <style> tag is rendered as a child of .care-dims-grid (grid has childCount:9 = 1 style + 8 cards). This is technically valid but unusual. The style tag as a grid item could cause a 1px invisible grid cell, though it has no visible impact. Consider moving inline <style> outside the grid or using a CSS module.

CareSoulPage.jsx lines 1648-1653: DimExpanded wrapper uses `display:grid; gridTemplateColumns:1fr` which is unnecessarily complex for a single-item wrapper. A simple `div` would suffice, but no functional impact.

Product count in Grooming panel: 95 products all rendered at once (no virtualization), causing panelHeight of 10275px. This could impact performance on low-end devices. Consider lazy loading or pagination for the product list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. SPA navigation to /care works via pushState + popstate event. Wait 7s for care page to load. The care-dims-grid has 9 children (1 style tag + 8 dim cards). DimExpanded is now a sibling to care-dims-grid (nextElementSibling when open). Products load: Grooming=95, Supplements=32. Login via 'Sign In' button click (opens modal) not direct form on /member-login.

features_verified.dimexpanded_full_width: PASS - Panel width 960px = grid width 960px (widthDiff=0, isFullWidth=True)
features_verified.dimexpanded_is_sibling: PASS - DimExpanded is nextElementSibling of .care-dims-grid, not a grid cell child
features_verified.grooming_panel_content: PASS - Shows ✂️ icon + Grooming title, Mira quote 'I matched everything here to Mojo\'s long, silky coat.', tabs (All, Other, Shampoo & Conditioner, Ear & Eye Care, At-Home Kits, Spa at Home, Brushes & Combs), 95 products
features_verified.supplements_panel: PASS - Opens full width (960px) below all 8 dim cards when Supplements clicked
features_verified.other_cards_visible: PASS - All 8 dim cards remain visible when panel is open (second row visible above expanded panel in screenshot)
features_verified.close_button: PASS - Close ✕ button visible in expanded panel header
features_verified.grid_columns: PASS - Grid renders 4 columns on desktop (232.5px x 4 = 960px)

rca_of_fix.description: DimExpanded previously rendered inside .care-dims-grid as a grid cell, causing it to squeeze into one column cell instead of spanning full width.
rca_of_fix.fix_applied: Moved {activeDim && } wrapper div to be a sibling of .care-dims-grid (after the closing of the grid). This is the same pattern as DineSoulPage.jsx where DimExpanded is also a sibling after dine-dims-grid.
